shot_type_and_framing: medium shot with the cake stand centered horizontally in the lower two-thirds of the frame
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the cake stand's marble surface
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel, 50mm focal length style, shallow depth of field softly blurring the background
environment_description: indoor setting with a wooden table surface, a beige upholstered chair on the left, and a small wooden table with a bowl and potted plant in the softly blurred background
subject_description: modern cake stand with a smooth white marble circular top and a conical gold metallic base
motion_behavior: static with minimal natural vibration, emphasizing the solidity and smooth texture of the materials
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, and filmic with a warm neutral color palette
